mapper.select:
SELECT u.*, c.cname AS companyName, d.name AS deptName FROM tbl_privilege_user u LEFT JOIN tbl_privilege_company c ON c.id = u.company_id LEFT JOIN tbl_privilege_department d ON d.id = u.dept_id
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_privilege_user u LEFT JOIN tbl_privilege_company c ON c.id = u.company_id LEFT JOIN tbl_privilege_department d ON d.id = u.dept_id
